pageDescription: Create and edit themes that recolor every page and its components. Use Simple mode for a single accent, or Advanced mode for per-token, navigation and per-page control.
themesDesc: Select a theme to edit, or create your own. The active theme applies across the whole app.
presetReadonly: Built-in presets are read-only. Duplicate this theme to customize it.
deleteDialogDesc: This action cannot be undone. The theme will be permanently removed.
previewModeHelp: Only changes this preview. Themes apply to both light and dark; use the header toggle to switch modes.
seedColorDesc: Pick one color; the full palette (surfaces, text and accents) is derived automatically with accessible contrast.
tokensDesc: Edit the light-mode color for each component token; the dark-mode shade is auto-derived for readability. Charts and destructive colors follow your theme automatically.
brandDesc: The two colors used for the hero panel and the page-header backdrop gradient.
sectionAccentsDesc: Primary + secondary color for each section — drives its navigation menu, home cards and gradients. Untouched sections keep their built-in colors.
statusDesc: Semantic colors used across data views. 'Danger' also drives destructive buttons.
perPageDesc: Assign a specific theme to individual pages. When you visit the page, its theme is applied globally.
overrideActive: This page uses its own theme
globalAccentDesc: Primary/secondary/tertiary colors applied to every page component, unless a page has its own accent below.
pageAccentsDesc: Fine-tune the accent colors for a specific page: its cards, icons, highlights, gradients and glows.
customizerDesc: Select a color element from the list and adjust it using the color picker, hex input, or RGB values.
